title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
